Container.Name: AMP-Docker-in-Docker
Container.Overview: Community-made image for CubeCoders AMP (Podman variant), bundling Podman for "containerized" instances. A separate custom AMP template (Dune Admin) is provided for running the dune-admin web panel for a Dune: Awakening private server. UNOFFICIAL and unsupported by CubeCoders.
Container.Description: Community-made image for CubeCoders AMP (Podman variant). Bundles Podman + the fixes needed to run AMP "containerized" instances. The dune-admin web panel for a Dune: Awakening private server is provided separately as a custom AMP template (Dune Admin) rather than being built in. This is an UNOFFICIAL image and is not endorsed or supported by CubeCoders.

Config.Name: AMP Data
Config.Description: All AMP data (instances, saves, web UI login). Access Mode MUST be RW: Shared for Podman containerized instances.

Config.Name: User ID (UID)
Config.Description: Host user that owns the AMP data volume. Unraid default is 99.

Config.Name: Group ID (GID)
Config.Description: Host group for the user above. Unraid default is 100.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Username of the admin user created on first boot only.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the admin user (used only when first created). Change it after first sign-in.
